failures.description: No failure occurred in the trajectory.
failures.checklist_reasoning: No taxonomy category clearly applies. The agent followed the required plan: it decomposed the task, called ProductCatalogSearch with available_only=true, backlight=RGB, and product_type=Mechanical Keyboard, then filtered the returned evidence for prices strictly greater than $233.90. The tool returned five items; only item_id 1151293680 at 272.33 and item_id 2299424241 at 237.48 satisfy the condition. The item priced exactly 233.90 was correctly excluded.
